input.command:
for file in /workspace/data/*.csv; do
  echo "File: $file"
  empty_count=$(grep -c "^$" "$file" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  total_lines=$(wc -l < "$file")
  echo "  Total lines: $total_lines"
  echo "  Empty rows: $empty_count"
  if [ "$empty_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "  ✓ HAS EMPTY ROWS"
  else
    echo "  No empty rows"
  fi
  echo ""
done
